title.en: INSTALLATION OF ELECTRIC CABLES OR LINES, OR OF COMBINED OPTICAL AND ELECTRIC CABLES OR LINES
Methods or apparatus specially adapted for installing, maintaining, repairing or dismantling electric cables or lines
{for cutting cables or wires, or splicing}
for overhead lines or cables
for laying cables, e.g. laying apparatus on vehicle
for removing insulation or armouring from cables, e.g. from the end thereof
for joining or terminating cables
for repairing insulation or armouring of cables

Installations of electric cables or lines or protective tubing therefor in or on buildings, equivalent structures or vehicles (installations of bus-bars H02G5/00; overhead installations H02G7/00; installations in or on the ground H02G9/00)
Details
Installations of cables or lines through walls, floors or ceilings, e.g. into buildings
{Installation of lines or cables on walls, ceilings or floors by means of insulators (insulators H01B17/00)}

{Installations of cables, lines, or separate protective tubing therefor directly on or in walls, ceilings, or floors (by means of insulators H02G3/24; supports for pipes, cables or protective tubing F16L3/00; hose-clips F16L33/02)}
{Installations of cables, lines, or separate protective tubing therefor in conduits or ducts pre-established in walls, ceilings or floors}
Installations of cables or lines on walls, floors or ceilings
Installations of cables or lines in walls, floors or ceilings
Installations of bus-bars
{Joints between bus-bars for compensating thermal expansion}
{Laminated bus-bars}
{Butt joining of bus-bars by means of a common bolt, e.g. splice joint (electrically conductive connections characterised by contacting members H01R4/58)}
Open installations
Partially-enclosed installations, e.g. in ducts and adapted for sliding or rolling current collection
Totally-enclosed installations, e.g. in metal casings
Cooling
Overhead installations of electric lines or cables (installations of bus-bars H02G5/00)
Devices for adjusting or maintaining mechanical tension, e.g. take-up device
Arrangements or devices for relieving mechanical tension
Suspension arrangements or devices for electric cables or lines
Devices for maintaining distance between parallel conductors, e.g. spacer
Arrangements or devices for damping mechanical oscillations of lines, e.g. for reducing production of sound {(damping spacers H02G7/125)}
Devices for removing snow or ice from lines or cables
Devices affording mechanical protection in the event of breakage of a line or cable, e.g. net for catching broken lines
Spatial arrangements or dispositions of lines or cables on poles, posts or towers
Arrangements of earthing wires suspended between mastheads
Installations of electric cables or lines in or on the ground or water
laid directly in or on the ground, river-bed or sea-bottom; Coverings therefor, e.g. tile
in surface ducts; Ducts or covers therefor
in underground tubes or conduits; Tubes or conduits therefor
in tunnels
in cable chambers, e.g. in manhole or in handhole
supported on or from floats, e.g. in water
Arrangements of electric cables or lines between relatively-movable parts
{using gravity-loaded or spring-loaded loop}
{using extensible carrier for the cable, e.g. self-coiling spring (extensible conductors or cables H01B7/06)}
using take-up reel or drum
Installations of lightning conductors; Fastening thereof to supporting structure
{Active discharge triggering}
{Connection to earth}
{Detecting; Measuring; Sensing; Testing; Simulating}
{Discharge by conduction or dissipation, e.g. rods, arresters, spark gaps}
Cable fittings
{Filling materials, e.g. solid or fluid insulation}
Devices for relieving mechanical stress
Sealing means for cable inlets (inlets for cables filled with, or surrounded by, gas or oil H02G15/32)
Cable terminations (for gas- or oil-filled cables H02G15/22)
Cable junctions (for gas or oil filled cables H02G15/24)
Cable fittings for cables filled with or surrounded by gas or oil (H02G15/34 takes precedence)
Cable fittings for cryogenic cables {(superconductive cables per se H01B12/00)}
Indexing scheme relating to installation of electric cables or lines covered by H02G
Prevention of theft of valuable metals
Identification of installed cables
Tools for installing cables comprising a spirit level
